title: Update module github.com/containers/common to v0.53.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/common](https://togithub.com/containers/common) | require | minor | `v0.52.0` -> `v0.53.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common</summary>

### [`v0.53.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.53.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/common/compare/v0.52.0...v0.53.0)

#### What's Changed

-   pkg/auth: fix nil deref by [@​vrothberg](https://togithub.com/vrothberg) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1419](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1419)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec from 1.1.0-rc.1 to 1.1.0-rc.2 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1423](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1423)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/docker/docker to v23.0.4+incompatible by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1425](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1425)
-   \[CI:DOCS] containers.conf: database_backend by [@​vrothberg](https://togithub.com/vrothberg) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1422](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1422)
-   pkg/sysinfo: unify NumCPU implementations by [@​tklauser](https://togithub.com/tklauser) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1428](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1428)
-   Use functions from x/sys/unix in numCPU on Linux by [@​tklauser](https://togithub.com/tklauser) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1429](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1429)
-   Don't call `umask` in subscriptions by [@​saschagrunert](https://togithub.com/saschagrunert) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1421](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1421)
-   pkg/subscription: fix regression in saveTo() by [@​Luap99](https://togithub.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1437](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1437)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​tklauser](https://togithub.com/tklauser) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1428](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1428)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/common/compare/v0.52.0...v0.53.0

</details>
